checksum.algorithm: sha256 over sorted unique normalized text hashes

contamination_leakage_notes: Repo-authored synthetic text only; exact normalized text hashes are checked for overlap between train and validation.
dedup_strategy: Unicode NFKC normalization, line-ending normalization, trailing-space trim, then exact normalized text sha256 deduplication.
language_mix: English, Japanese, and mixed Japanese/English training notes.

leakage_check.method: exact normalized text sha256 intersection between train and validation splits

license: Repo-authored fixture for this project; no third-party text source.
preprocessing_command: uv run python -m train.pretrain --config configs/kgpt_tiny.yaml --max-steps 200 --run-name phase04a_tiny_smoke
split_method: Deterministic sha256 ordering by seed, record id, and normalized text hash with validation_fraction=0.20.
tokenized_metadata_format: JSON sidecar with token file paths, dtype, sha256, tokenizer id, and split names
url_or_local_note: Repo-authored local synthetic English/Japanese tiny pretraining corpus embedded in this config.
